name: Moonshot AI / Kimi
description: Registers Moonshot AI / Kimi as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Moonshot API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Moonshot API key
settings.description: Moonshot API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to MOONSHOT_API_KEY.

providers.name: Moonshot AI / Kimi
providers.description: Refreshes Moonshot/Kimi chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
